data.content: Implementation review approved. Scope is limited to src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx and src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox-width.test.ts. The header now uses a two-column grid so the title editor fills the available width while preserving a dedicated auto-width close-button column, and the inline input removes border, background, and focus chrome for direct title editing. Sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d: bun run lint (same pre-existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
